name: Crispy Baked Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each onion into 4 thick slices; separate into rings, reserving small rings for other uses. Set aside.
2. Combine the crushed cornflakes cereal and the next three ingredients in one bowl.
3. Beat the egg substitute at high speed with an electric mixer until soft peaks form.
4. Dip half of the onion rings in the beaten egg substitute, then dredge them in the crumb mixture.
5. Place the onion rings in a single layer on baking sheets coated with cooking spray.
6. Repeat steps 3-5 with the remaining onion rings and crumb mixture.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 15 minutes or until crisp; serve warm.
Makes: 4 servings. (254 calories [2% from fat] per serving)
10.8g protein, 0.5g fat (0.1g saturated), 50.6g carbohydrate, 2.2g fiber, 0mg cholesterol, 1,178mg sodium, and 39mg calcium.
